_description: SRE Agent for PagerDuty incident response with VM, Cosmos DB, and HTTP error investigation skills. Uses AppInsights + Log Analytics + Azure Monitor connectors.
_prerequisites: Azure subscription with resource groups to monitor
PagerDuty account (OAuth configured post-deploy in portal)
Application Insights and/or Log Analytics workspace (optional but recommended)

appInsightsId.ask: Application Insights resource ID (or leave blank)

appInsightsAppId.ask: Application Insights App ID / GUID (or leave blank)

lawId.ask: Log Analytics workspace resource ID (or leave blank)

pagerdutyApiKey.ask: PagerDuty API key (Integration Key from PagerDuty service)

existingUamiId.ask: Existing UAMI resource ID (leave blank to create new)

existingAgentAppInsightsId.ask: Existing App Insights resource ID for agent telemetry (leave blank to create new)
